Hub Home > personal-productivity > Weekly Planning & Prioritization System

Weekly Planning & Prioritization System

Turn a chaotic brain dump of tasks, meetings, and deadlines into a structured weekly plan with time blocks, priority rankings, and delegation suggestions. Designed for business owners juggling too many roles.

Beginner PASTE & GO Time-saving
Pro tip

Do the brain dump Sunday night or Monday morning. Literally list everything rattling around your head — no filtering, no organizing. Let AI do the sorting.

planning prioritization weekly plan time management time blocking productivity focus

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a productivity coach for busy business owners.

<brain_dump>
[LIST EVERYTHING — tasks, meetings, deadlines, ideas, follow-ups, worries, half-finished projects. No filtering. Just dump it...
You are a productivity coach for busy business owners.

<brain_dump>
[LIST EVERYTHING — tasks, meetings, deadlines, ideas, follow-ups, worries, half-finished projects. No filtering. Just dump it...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

You are a productivity coach for busy business owners.

<brain_dump>
[LIST EVERYTHING — tasks, meetings, deadlines, ideas, follow-ups, worries, half-finished projects. No filtering. Just dump it all.]
</brain_dump>

<context>
Role: [YOUR ROLE — e.g., "founder wearing all hats", "marketing director", "solo consultant"]
This week's fixed commitments: [meetings, calls, deadlines already on calendar]
Biggest goal this week: [ONE thing that would make this a great week]
Hours available for focused work: [realistic number]
Team members who can help: [names/roles, or "just me"]
</context>

Create my weekly plan:

1. **Priority matrix** — categorize every item from the brain dump into:
   - DO THIS WEEK (high impact, time-sensitive)
   - SCHEDULE (important but not this week — suggest when)
   - DELEGATE (someone else should handle — suggest who)
   - DROP (not worth doing — explain why)

2. **Daily plan** (Mon-Fri) — time-blocked schedule:
   - Deep work blocks (90 min, labeled with the specific task)
   - Meeting/call prep windows
   - Admin batches
   - Buffer time for fires
   - End-of-day shutdown ritual (15 min)

3. **Top 3 daily** — the three tasks that matter most each day, in order.

4. **Energy management** — place demanding tasks in high-energy periods. Flag any day that looks overloaded.

5. **Friday review prompts** — 5 questions to ask myself at end of week.
Notes: Claude produces detailed, realistic plans. Be honest about your available hours — Claude will push back if your task list exceeds your time budget rather than creating a fiction.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a productivity coach for overwhelmed business owners. Help me turn chaos into a plan.

Here is everything on my mind this...
Act as a productivity coach for overwhelmed business owners. Help me turn chaos into a plan.

Here is everything on my mind this...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Act as a productivity coach for overwhelmed business owners. Help me turn chaos into a plan.

Here is everything on my mind this week:
[BRAIN DUMP — tasks, meetings, deadlines, ideas, worries, everything]

Context:
- Role: [YOUR ROLE]
- Fixed commitments: [calendar items]
- #1 goal this week: [ONE thing]
- Hours for focused work: [realistic]
- Team: [who can help, or "just me"]

Create:
1. Priority matrix — DO / SCHEDULE / DELEGATE / DROP for every item
2. Daily time-blocked plan (Mon-Fri) with deep work, meetings, admin, buffer
3. Top 3 tasks per day in order
4. Energy management — hard tasks in peak hours, flag overloaded days
5. Friday review — 5 end-of-week reflection questions
Notes: Use ChatGPT voice mode for the brain dump — talk through everything on your mind and let it transcribe. Faster than typing and you will remember more.
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
Help me plan my week.

**Brain dump:**
[EVERYTHING — tasks, meetings, deadlines, ideas,...
Help me plan my week.

**Brain dump:**
[EVERYTHING — tasks, meetings, deadlines, ideas,...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Help me plan my week.

**Brain dump:**
[EVERYTHING — tasks, meetings, deadlines, ideas, worries]

**Context:**
- Role: [YOUR ROLE]
- Fixed commitments: [calendar items]
- Top goal: [ONE thing]
- Hours available: [realistic]
- Team: [who can help]

Create:
1. Priority matrix — DO / SCHEDULE / DELEGATE / DROP
2. Daily time-blocked plan (Mon-Fri)
3. Top 3 per day
4. Energy management notes
5. Friday review questions

Check my Google Calendar if connected and factor in existing events.
Notes: Gemini in Google Workspace can read your actual calendar and build the plan around real commitments. Ask it to create Calendar events for the deep work blocks directly.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
Plan my week from this brain dump.

Everything on my mind:
[DUMP...

Everything on my mind:
[DUMP...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Plan my week from this brain dump.

Everything on my mind:
[DUMP EVERYTHING]

Role: [YOUR ROLE]
Fixed commitments: [calendar]
Top goal: [ONE thing]
Available hours: [realistic]
Team: [who helps]

Create:
1. Priority matrix — DO / SCHEDULE / DELEGATE / DROP
2. Daily time-blocked plan
3. Top 3 per day
4. Energy management
5. Friday review questions
Notes: Copilot can read your Outlook calendar and To Do lists to build the plan around your real schedule. Ask it to create To Do tasks and calendar blocks directly from the plan.
